caption: A man with glasses, wearing a white shirt, a red bow tie, tan suspenders, and a tall, grey, styled wig, is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears black over-ear headphones and is positioned in front of a wall decorated with several framed photographs. To his right, a mannequin is dressed in a black outfit, and clothing is visible on racks in the background. A logo appearing in the lower left of the scene reads "THE TALK SHOW PODCAST," while text on the right reads "GOSS TALK JOY." As the sequence progresses, the man remains in the same position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his head and facial expressions, while the background and equipment remain static.
